mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CONTENT_REVIEW WHERE CONTENTID = #{contentId} AND BLIND_YN = 'N'

SELECT A.CONTENT_REVIEW_NO AS contentReviewNo , A.CONTENTID AS contentId , A.MEMBER_NO AS memberNo , NVL(B.NICKNAME, '탈퇴한 회원') AS nickname , A.REVIEW_COMMENT AS reviewComment , A.RATING AS rating , TO_CHAR(A.CREATE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS createDt FROM CONTENT_REVIEW A LEFT JOIN MEMBER_ACTIVE B ON B.MEMBER_NO = A.MEMBER_NO WHERE A.CONTENTID = #{contentId} AND A.BLIND_YN = 'N' ORDER BY A.CREATE_DT DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH FIRST #{size} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert:
SELECT CONTENT_REVIEW_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO CONTENT_REVIEW (CONTENT_REVIEW_NO, MEMBER_NO, CONTENTID, REVIEW_COMMENT, RATING, CREATE_DT) VALUES (#{contentReviewNo}, #{memberNo}, #{contentId}, #{reviewComment}, #{rating}, SYSDATE)
